name: Vemanti Group, Inc.
business: The company provides business-class VoIP services to small and medium-sized businesses in the United States through its wholly owned subsidiary VoiceStep, and is developing a digital-only banking platform for SMEs in Vietnam in partnership with PVcomBank.
sellsTo: Small and medium-sized businesses in the United States
Small and medium-sized enterprises in Vietnam

exposures.sentence: The Company intends to focus its future product and business development on digital banking (aka neobanking) and fintech applications using disruptive technologies aimed at making credit simpler and easier to access for small to medium enterprises ( SMEs ) in our target markets.

Through our wholly owned subsidiary VoiceStep, we continue to provide a one-stop solution with regard to business-class VoIP services to our small to medium-sized business customers in the United States.

catalysts.event: First product launch for select customers
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects to launch its first product for select customers by September 2024.
